nodes.label: Azaziah
nodes.description: One of the Levitical harpers in the temple (1 Chr. 15:21).

verses.text: And Mattithiah, and Elipheleh, and Mikneiah, and Obededom, and Jeiel, and Azaziah, with harps on the Sheminith to excel.
